title: Builder Program
description: A hands-on program where participants solve real-world problems, collaborate with peers, and ship practical projects with industry mentors.
features: Demo Day with startup accelerator leads

title: Campus Chapters
description: Lead a Layerz chapter at your university, organize local technical workshops, grow a builder community, and unlock global resources.
features: Budget and swag for local events

title: Hackathons
description: Compete, collaborate, and turn ideas into working software prototypes during our 48-hour innovation challenges with cash prizes.

title: Startup Incubation
description: Supporting early-stage developer founders in validating their market, building a scalable architecture, and preparing for initial funding rounds.
